testcase.name: [Demo-Learn] Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display error for empty username
[Demo-Learn] Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display error for empty password
[Demo-Learn] Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display errors for empty username and password
[Demo-Learn] Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display alert for invalid credentials
[Demo-Learn] Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should login successfully with valid credentials & display dashboard
[Demo-Learn-Firefox] Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display error for empty username
[Demo-Learn-Firefox] Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display error for empty password
[Demo-Learn-Firefox] Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display errors for empty username and password
[Demo-Learn-Firefox] Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display alert for invalid credentials
[Demo-Learn-Firefox] Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should login successfully with valid credentials & display dashboard
